requirement_topic.en: SKELEC / NEVLEC Grid-Connection Settings — 230/400 V, 50 Hz, IEC 62116 Anti-Islanding, and IEC 61727 Interface Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: SKELEC / NEVLEC并网参数——230/400 V、50 Hz、IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727接口证据
requirement_topic.zht: SKELEC / NEVLEC併網參數——230/400 V、50 Hz、IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727介面證據

summary.en: Saint Kitts and Nevis public electricity supply is served by SKELEC on Saint Kitts and NEVLEC on Nevis, with project-specific utility approval requirements. Grid-tied solar PV inverters should be configured for the Saint Kitts and Nevis 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply system and for SKELEC / NEVLEC project-specific protection settings. The frequency is the same 50 Hz frequency commonly used in China, but the voltage differs: Saint Kitts and Nevis uses 230/400 V while China commonly uses 220/380 V under GB/T 156. For utility-interconnected PV inverters, project documentation should include IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, plus documented country-code or custom firmware settings for voltage, frequency, trip thresholds, reconnection delay, and export-control functions.
summary.zh: 圣基茨和尼维斯公共电力供应在圣基茨由SKELEC服务、在尼维斯由NEVLEC服务，并须按项目取得公用事业接入批准。并网太阳能光伏逆变器应配置为圣基茨和尼维斯230/400 V、50 Hz供电体系，并符合SKELEC / NEVLEC项目特定保护整定。频率与中国常用50 Hz相同，但电压不同：圣基茨和尼维斯使用230/400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156通常使用220/380 V。对于公用电网互联光伏逆变器，项目文件应包括IEC 62116防孤岛证据和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，并记录电压、频率、跳闸阈值、重连延迟和防逆流功能的国家代码或自定义固件设置。
summary.zht: 聖基茨和尼維斯公共電力供應在聖基茨由SKELEC服務、在尼維斯由NEVLEC服務，並須按項目取得公用事業接入批准。併網太陽能光伏逆變器應配置為聖基茨和尼維斯230/400 V、50 Hz供電體系，並符合SKELEC / NEVLEC項目特定保護整定。頻率與中國常用50 Hz相同，但電壓不同：聖基茨和尼維斯使用230/400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156通常使用220/380 V。對於公用電網互聯光伏逆變器，項目文件應包括IEC 62116防孤島證據和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，並記錄電壓、頻率、跳閘閾值、重連延遲和防逆流功能的國家代碼或自定義韌體設置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
SKELEC / NEVLEC interconnection and project commissioning conditions — confirm project-specific voltage, protection, metering, and export-control settings
SKELEC / NEVLEC electricity-sector regulation context for Saint Kitts and Nevis utility projects

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, and domestic anti-islanding reports. These documents are usually prepared for China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid conditions and Chinese grid-operator protection settings. They do not automatically prove suitability for Saint Kitts and Nevis's 230/400 V, 50 Hz SKELEC / NEVLEC network. Even where frequency is the same, voltage thresholds, reconnection timing, ride-through behaviour, neutral/earthing assumptions, and export-control settings must be reviewed for the Saint Kitts and Nevis installation.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021及国内防孤岛报告。这些文件通常针对中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网条件和中国电网运营商保护整定编制，不能自动证明适用于圣基茨和尼维斯230/400 V、50 Hz SKELEC / NEVLEC网络。即使频率相同，电压阈值、重连时间、穿越行为、中性线/接地假设和防逆流设置也必须针对圣基茨和尼维斯安装进行审查。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021及國內防孤島報告。這些文件通常針對中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網條件和中國電網運營商保護整定編制，不能自動證明適用於聖基茨和尼維斯230/400 V、50 Hz SKELEC / NEVLEC網路。即使頻率相同，電壓閾值、重連時間、穿越行為、中性線/接地假設和防逆流設置也必須針對聖基茨和尼維斯安裝進行審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages; China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline)

gap.en: Gap: China grid certificates do not establish SKELEC / NEVLEC acceptance. Exporters should obtain the SKELEC / NEVLEC project connection conditions, set the inverter profile for Saint Kitts and Nevis 230/400 V at 50 Hz, document anti-islanding thresholds, voltage and frequency trip points, reconnection delay, ride-through limits, and export-control settings, and ensure IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence covers the supplied firmware profile. Do not state that Saint Kitts and Nevis voltage matches China; only the 50 Hz frequency matches.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证书不能构成SKELEC / NEVLEC接受依据。出口商应取得SKELEC / NEVLEC项目接入条件，将逆变器配置为圣基茨和尼维斯230/400 V、50 Hz，记录防孤岛阈值、电压和频率跳闸点、重连延迟、穿越限值及防逆流设置，并确保IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据覆盖所供应固件配置。不得声称圣基茨和尼维斯电压与中国相同；仅50 Hz频率相同。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證書不能構成SKELEC / NEVLEC接受依據。出口商應取得SKELEC / NEVLEC項目接入條件，將逆變器配置為聖基茨和尼維斯230/400 V、50 Hz，記錄防孤島閾值、電壓和頻率跳閘點、重連延遲、穿越限值及防逆流設置，並確保IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據覆蓋所供應韌體配置。不得聲稱聖基茨和尼維斯電壓與中國相同；僅50 Hz頻率相同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any grid-tied solar PV installation accepted by SKELEC / NEVLEC or reviewed under SKELEC / NEVLEC-regulated utility conditions; exact settings are project-specific gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-review needs but is not transferable to SKELEC / NEVLEC acceptance without Saint Kitts and Nevis configuration review

source.publisher: St Kitts Electricity Company (SKELEC) and Nevis Electricity Company (NEVLEC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Saint Kitts and Nevis grid settings as 230/400 V at 50 Hz, not China 220/380 V. Reconfigure and document the inverter profile for SKELEC / NEVLEC project conditions and obtain IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence covering that profile. Confirm current SKELEC / NEVLEC requirements before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将圣基茨和尼维斯并网参数视为230/400 V、50 Hz，而非中国220/380 V。须按SKELEC / NEVLEC项目条件重新配置并记录逆变器配置，并取得覆盖该配置的IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据。出货或调试前请确认当前SKELEC / NEVLEC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將聖基茨和尼維斯併網參數視為230/400 V、50 Hz，而非中國220/380 V。須按SKELEC / NEVLEC項目條件重新配置並記錄逆變器配置，並取得覆蓋該配置的IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據。出貨或調試前請確認當前SKELEC / NEVLEC要求。
